 `D:\数字分身2\数字分身\brain\对话监控.pyw`

```text
     1→# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
     2→import json
     3→import subprocess
     4→import sys
     5→import tkinter as tk
     6→from tkinter import ttk, scrolledtext
     7→from pathlib import Path
     8→
     9→BRAIN = Path(__file__).parent
    10→CLEAN_LOG = BRAIN / "QLJL_clean.json"
    11→DAEMON = BRAIN / "context_daemon.py"
    12→
    13→# 启动后台记录
    14→subprocess.Popen([sys.executable, str(DAEMON), "run"],
    15→                 creationflags=subprocess.CREATE_NO_WINDOW)
    16→
    17→# 查看窗口
    18→root = tk.Tk()
    19→root.title("对话监控 [实时]")
    20→root.geometry("800x600")
    21→
    22→frame = ttk.Frame(root)
    23→frame.pack(fill=tk.X, padx=5, pady=5)
    24→
    25→last_count = [0]
    26→all_msgs = []  # 保存所有消息用于搜索
    27→
    28→def load():
    29→    global all_msgs
    30→    if not CLEAN_LOG.exists():
    31→        return
    32→    try:
    33→        msgs = json.loads(CLEAN_LOG.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    34→        if len(msgs) == last_count[0]:
    35→            return
    36→        last_count[0] = len(msgs)
    37→        all_msgs = msgs
    38→        display_msgs(msgs)
    39→    except:
    40→        pass
    41→
    42→def display_msgs(msgs):
    43→    text.delete(1.0, tk.END)
    44→    for m in msgs:
    45→        icon = "👤 用户" if m.get("role") == "user" else "🤖 CLAUDE"
    46→        date_str = m.get("date", "")
    47→        time_str = m.get("time", "")
    48→        datetime_str = f"{date_str} {time_str}" if date_str else time_str
    49→        turn = m.get("turn", 0)
    50→        text.insert(tk.END, f"\n{icon} #{turn}  {datetime_str}\n")
    51→        text.insert(tk.END, m.get("content", "") + "\n")
    52→        text.insert(tk.END, "-"*50 + "\n")
    53→    text.see(tk.END)
    54→
    55→def search():
    56→    keyword = search_var.get().strip()
    57→    if not keyword:
    58→        display_msgs(all_msgs)
    59→        return
    60→    filtered = [m for m in all_msgs if keyword.lower() in m.get("content", "").lower()]
    61→    display_msgs(filtered)
    62→    status_label.config(text=f"找到 {len(filtered)} 条")
    63→
    64→def clear_search():
    65→    search_var.set("")
    66→    display_msgs(all_msgs)
    67→    status_label.config(text="实时记录中...")
    68→
    69→def auto_refresh():
    70→    load()
    71→    root.after(2000, auto_refresh)
    72→
    73→def copy_all():
    74→    root.clipboard_clear()
    75→    root.clipboard_append(text.get(1.0, tk.END))
    76→
    77→# 搜索框
    78→search_var = tk.StringVar()
    79→search_entry = ttk.Entry(frame, textvariable=search_var, width=20)
    80→search_entry.pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=2)
    81→search_entry.bind("<Return>", lambda e: search())
    82→ttk.Button(frame, text="搜索", command=search).pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=2)
    83→ttk.Button(frame, text="清除", command=clear_search).pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=2)
    84→ttk.Separator(frame, orient=tk.VERTICAL).pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=5, fill=tk.Y)
    85→ttk.Button(frame, text="复制全部", command=copy_all).pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=2)
    86→status_label = ttk.Label(frame, text="实时记录中...")
    87→status_label.pack(side=tk.RIGHT, padx=5)
    88→
    89→text = scrolledtext.ScrolledText(root, wrap=tk.WORD, font=("Microsoft YaHei", 10))
    90→text.pack(fill=tk.BOTH, expand=True, padx=5, pady=5)
    91→
    92→load()
    93→auto_refresh()
    94→root.mainloop()
    95→
```
</details></tool-use>
